scope.complete_ledger_scope: All tested tied minimal H components in the complete original/aut-orbit Kotzig boundary-cache artifact. Isomorphism preserves the boundary set {0,1,2} but not the individual names of 0,1,2.
scope.modified_and_fixed12_scope: Graph-level category counts come from the compact modified-Kotzig and fixed-(1,2)-Kempe-chain audit artifacts. Those compact artifacts record aggregate unique-H counts and samples, not every per-H class assignment; the manuscript wording therefore uses aggregate counts and treats the class ledger as audit provenance, not as a theorem-level classification by final category.
